title: Vela Proof Verification Record (v0.1)
description: A signed attestation that an external verifier (Lean kernel, Coq runtime, etc.) ran a Carina Proof artifact's script and produced a specific output hash. The substrate stores the attestation; the verifier runs outside the substrate. Consumers verify the attestation's signature against the verifier_actor's pubkey and trust the verifier's judgment for the named (tool, tool_version, lake_manifest_hash) tuple.

script_locator.description: Content-addressed locator of the proof script the verifier ran. Typically `sha256:<64hex>` over the bytes of the script file.

lake_manifest_hash.description: Optional sha256 over the Lake manifest (or equivalent build manifest for non-Lean tools). When present, pins the dependency-version closure so two verifications under the same manifest hash are reproducible.

verifier_output_hash.description: sha256 over the verifier's standard output. Two runs under the same toolchain + script + manifest produce the same hash.

verifier_actor.description: Free-form actor identifier (typically a GitHub Action job url, a registered Vela actor id, or an institutional steward id).

signature.description: Ed25519 signature over the canonical preimage (record body with signature + verification_id zeroed).
